data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id, d.name AS department_name, AVG(s.gpa) AS avg_gpa
FROM public.departments AS d
LEFT JOIN public.students AS s
  ON s.department_id = d.id
  AND s.gpa IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC;

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

issues: Departments with no students will produce NULL avg_gpa and Vega-Lite will not render a bar for those departments; if you want to show them explicitly (e.g., as zero or a placeholder) adjust the query or visualization.
Y-axis domain is hard-coded to [0,4]; confirm your GPA scale is out of 4.0 or remove the fixed domain to avoid misrepresentation.

X-axis encodes only department_name. If department names are not unique, distinct department_id values could be conflated visually; consider including department_id in the label or using a combined/unique field for the x-axis.

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

result.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id, d.name AS department_name, AVG(s.gpa) AS avg_gpa
FROM public.departments AS d
LEFT JOIN public.students AS s
  ON s.department_id = d.id
  AND s.gpa IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC;

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

issues: Departments with no students will produce NULL avg_gpa and Vega-Lite will not render a bar for those departments; if you want to show them explicitly (e.g., as zero or a placeholder) adjust the query or visualization.
Y-axis domain is hard-coded to [0,4]; confirm your GPA scale is out of 4.0 or remove the fixed domain to avoid misrepresentation.

X-axis encodes only department_name. If department names are not unique, distinct department_id values could be conflated visually; consider including department_id in the label or using a combined/unique field for the x-axis.
